arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Toby Collyer 'decision made' after eye-catching display against Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly have no plans to let midfielder Toby Collyer leave the club on loan before the end of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Tamworth player racially abused after Spurs loss
arts.sum: Tamworth player Chris Wreh made himself unavailable for the club's match against Boldmere St Michaels on Tuesday after their response to the racist abuse he suffered following their FA Cup defeat to Tottenham Hotspur on Sunday.

arts.sum: However, after reports surfaced that suggest Arsenal have beaten Liverpool and Real Madrid to reaching an agreement with Martin Zubimendi, it makes more sense than it might initially seem. Arsenal dream midfield with Martin Zubimendi

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand wants to confront Mikel Arteta at North London Derby with one question
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta will hope to rejuvenate Arsenal's season at home to Tottenham Hotspur on Wednesday following their FA Cup elimination at the hands of Manchester United

arts.ttl: Man United, Tottenham 'miss out' on January target with switch to European giants 'confirmed'
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur allegedly suffer a transfer blow, as Juventus agree a deal to sign Paris Saint-Germain's Randal Kolo Muani on loan.

arts.ttl: Player snubs transfer to Tottenham – Not even prepared to take notice of Spurs’ arguments
arts.sum: On Tuesday, L’Equipe reported Tottenham Hotspur have made advances in their efforts to sign Paris Saint-Germain’s Randal Kolo Muani. It was also stated Spurs chairman Daniel Levy has held talks with PSG president Nasser Al-Khelaifi. The same newspaper then explained Tottenham made an offer to sign the 26-year-old on loan with an obligation to buy.
